@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "contour-1894-instructions-for-presenting-grpc-services-needs-a-guide",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "contour: Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide",
+    "description": "Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current contour deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your contour version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nhelm list -n contour 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working contour installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review contour configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant contour configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get configmap -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour\n```\nWe need a guide that concisely describes the HTTPProxy configuration and service annotations required to proxy grpc through contour."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide",
+        "description": "so far for a test fixture/example I'm planning on starting a new repo and using goreleaser etc. to build it and containerize it\n\nfound a few samples that are useful *but* they're all missing something\n- [examples in `grpc-go`](https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/tree/master/examples) are great but not\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: adddog-envoy-config\ndata:\n  config.yaml: |\n    domain: contour\n    admin:\n      access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log\n      address:\n        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 9901 }\n\n    static_resources:\n      listeners:\n      - name: listener_0\n        address:\n          socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 8080 }\n        filter_chains:\n        - filters:\n          - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get events -n contour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Instructions for presenting grpc services needs a guide\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "so far for a test fixture/example I'm planning on starting a new repo and using goreleaser etc.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: adddog-envoy-config\ndata:\n  config.yaml: |\n    domain: contour\n    admin:\n      access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log\n      address:\n        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 9901 }\n\n    static_resources:\n      listeners:\n      - name: listener_0\n        address:\n          socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 8080 }\n        filter_chains:\n        - filters:\n          - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n              codec_type: auto\n              stat_prefix: ingress_http\n              route_config:\n                name: local_route\n                v"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "contour",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "contour"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/issues/1894",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 25,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
